top_signals.title: Bloomberg News Now
top_signals.summary:
US Hit Iran with Strikes & Blockades
Iran Sneaks Out Tankers via Hormuz 
Graham Sister Appointed to US Senate
Trump to Back Graham’s Russia Sanctions Bill
ICE Fatally Shoots Man in Maine
Stocks, Yields Steady Ahead of Banks Results, Warsh
Kevin Warsh on the Hill Today (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: America Extends Its Lead Over Russia and Saudi Arabia in Oil Output
top_signals.summary: While the United States has been the world’s biggest consumer of oil for decades, it became the largest oil producer, too, back in 2018, and has retained that crown ever since. The shale revolution and the growth in the Permian oil production have allowed the U.S. not only to retain the top spot ahead of Russia and Saudi Arabia, but to extend the lead over these OPEC+ allies, whose output has been restrained by the voluntary production cuts in recent years. This year, the U.S. has been expanding the gap further despite the modest growth (so…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum tweet volume falls to 12-month lows despite institutional crypto boom
top_signals.summary: Retail attention via social chatter is back to 2020 levels even as institutional involvement has moved in the opposite direction.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Putin Will Turn a Cease-Fire Into a Weapon
top_signals.summary: A new use for Russia’s old playbook in Ukraine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Vanadium awarded gov’t offtake contract for National Defense Stockpile
top_signals.summary: The company operates two facilities in Arkansas that recover and process vanadium from petroleum refining.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US government moves over $288 million in seized bitcoin, ether to Coinbase Prime: Arkham
top_signals.summary: According to Arkham, U.S. government wallets maintain a large crypto portfolio estimated at over $20 billion, including 324,552 BTC.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Galway’s New Brunswick gold resource misses analyst forecast
top_signals.summary: Last month, Red Cloud Securities forecast the overall new resource could approach 3 million oz. gold.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.summary: Private companies are making Beijing look good in the developing world.

top_signals.title: MAX Power launches hydrogen validation drilling program
top_signals.summary: The multi-well commercial validation drill program is in search of what the company calls “world’s first large-scale commercial discovery of natural hydrogen.”
